calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-11-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Thyssenkrupp Elevator Corporation To Handlerys First Demand For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William Hernquist II, Esq. 619-687-2300 of Hernquist & Associates for Plaintiff Thyssenkrupp Elevator Corp.
Daniel Pastor, Esq. 415-772-5706 of Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass LLP for Defendant HANDLERY HOTELS, INC., HANDLERY HOLDING COMPANY, INC.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT HANDLERY HOTELS, INC., HANDLERY HOLDING COMPANY, INC's. Motion To Compel Further Responses By Thyssenkrupp Elevator Corporation To Handlerys First Demand For Production Of Documents is Granted per stipulation of the parties. Plaintiff to address time for production by email to the Court and Opposing Counsel by 2/13/18. Defendant to email a proposed order to Opposing Counsel and directly to the Judge Pro Tem by 2/13/18.

Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Continued To May-14-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
